title: tanacetum macrophyllum
intro: Tanacetum macrophyllum, also known as large-leaf tansy, is a flowering plant in the daisy family. It is known for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its essential oils and flavonoids, which have been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin issues. The health benefits of Tanacetum macrophyllum include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help to soothe digestive issues and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Tanacetum macrophyllum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although it is essential to use it in moderation and under the guidance of a healthcare professional due to its potential toxicity.
